title: Tell Him
meaning_summary: Tell Him adds a second Let's Talk About Love anchor by connecting Celine Dion's blockbuster late-1990s ballad era to duet, adult-pop, and international catalog listening.
revenue_drivers: Album-halo demand from My Heart Will Go On keeps the parent album visible.
Adult-contemporary and duet playlist contexts support steady long-tail replay.
Celine Dion's global ballad catalog helps secondary singles retain value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models adult-pop catalog demand, album halo, duet recognition, and label/publishing participation.

ownership.master_owner: Label / catalog rightsholder with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across songwriters and publisher administration
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public royalty statement.
